column2: UAS Fly-Away Test in Class D Airspace
column3: ['Set up the unmanned aircraft system (UAS) within Class D controlled airspace. ', 'Disable any automatic containment features available on the UAS, if applicable. ', 'Simulate a fly-away situation by removing control of the UAS. ', 'Verify that the UAS leaves the geofence boundaries. ']
column4: ['The UAS is successfully positioned and operating within Class D controlled airspace. ', 'All automatic containment features are disabled on the UAS. ', 'The UAS loses its intended flight path and begins to move outside the geofenced area. ', 'The UAS is no longer within the defined geofence boundaries. ']
